<!-- Peblla Marketing Team Knowledge Base — Auto-generated from group chat learnings -->

# OKR Framework

## Core Objective (Permanent — All Roles)

**O: Increase inquiry conversion + GEO brand exposure**

All roles are aligned to this objective. The direction is fixed; details may iterate.

## Monthly Target (March 2026)

**Peblla website inquiry submissions: +3** (compared to current baseline)

## Data Sources

- HubSpot: Website inquiry monitoring
- GA4: Traffic and conversion data
- Google Search Console: Search performance
- AI Search Platforms: GEO brand presence

## Role-Level KR Breakdown

### Ivy (Competitive Research)
| KR | Description |
|----|-------------|
| KR1 | Weekly competitive scan identifying content gaps convertible to inquiries |
| KR2 | Output differentiated topics to Sean/video team, directly serving conversion content production |

### Noah (GEO Monitoring)
| KR | Description |
|----|-------------|
| KR1 | Weekly testing of 4 AI platforms with quantified brand citation improvement |
| KR2 | GEO optimization recommendations to Sean, improving brand exposure in AI search |

### Sean (SEO/GEO Content)
| KR | Description |
|----|-------------|
| KR1 | 2-3 SEO+GEO optimized blogs per week with quantifiable keyword ranking improvements |
| KR2 | Blog organic traffic to inquiry conversion rate improvement |

### Miach (Social Media)
| KR | Description |
|----|-------------|
| KR1 | LinkedIn/Reddit/IG/FB brand exposure and engagement rate improvement |
| KR2 | Social media channel referral inquiries to the website |

### Nana (YouTube Operations)
| KR | Description |
|----|-------------|
| KR1 | Channel subscription and view growth |
| KR2 | YouTube referral inquiries to the website |
| KR3 | Tutorial videos reduce store setup training costs |

### Grace (Data Analysis)
| KR | Description |
|----|-------------|
| KR1 | 100% inquiry full-path tracking completeness |
| KR2 | Weekly conversion funnel analysis identifying drop-off points and driving optimization |

### Rex / Coco / Ace (AI Video Team)
| KR | Description |
|----|-------------|
| KR1 | Video content serves inquiry conversion (product showcase -> interest -> action) |
| KR2 | Video topics prioritize high-conversion scenarios (SMS Marketing, Online Ordering, etc.) |
| KR3 | Coordinate with Nana on YouTube publishing strategy to boost brand GEO exposure |

### Tutor (Tutorial Videos)
| KR | Description |
|----|-------------|
| KR1 | P0 tutorial videos delivered on schedule, reducing store setup training time |
| KR2 | Tutorial videos embedded in Help Center to reduce support tickets |

### Safer (Review)
| KR | Description |
|----|-------------|
| KR1 | 100% pre-publish review rate for all content |
| KR2 | Zero brand visual consistency incidents |

### Momo (Marketing Kit)
| KR | Description |
|----|-------------|
| KR1 | Timely delivery of new store marketing kits |
| KR2 | Kit quality satisfaction |

## Alignment Rules

- All reports must reflect OKR progress
- Weekly and daily to-dos must serve this Objective
- Video topic synergy: Marketing roles discovering video-relevant insights must sync with the AI video team immediately and flag high-value topics as P0
